name: Broccoli with Mustard Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut broccoli into flowerets. Peel stems and cut into diagonal pieces.
2. Steam the broccoli for 6-7 minutes until it is just tender crisp.
3. In a serving dish, whisk together the remaining ingredients to make the dressing.
4. When the broccoli is cooked, drain any excess water and toss it with the dressing.
